chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Crl. Bail Application No.D-05 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A No.780/2025. 2. For orders on office objection. 3. For hearing of main case. 21.04.2025 Mr. Ghulam Nabi Meo, advocate a/w Applicant. = 1 Urgency granted. 2 Deferred. 3 The applicant has been implicated in Cr.No.50/2025 for offence under sections 324, 353, 147, 148, 149, 337-H(ii), 427, 436 P.P.C r/w Section 6/7 ATA Act of PS Town, Mirpurkhas. Counsel for the applicant has contended that the applicant is innocent and falsely implicated in this case by the complainant and the applicant intends to surrender before the learned trial court but he feels apprehension of his arrest at the hands of police in order to humiliate and disgrace him. Without touching merits or demerits of the case, the applicant is granted protective bail for a period of 05 days commencing from today subject to furnishing a solvent surety in the sum of Rs.30,000/- (Rupees Thirty Thousand only) and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the learned Additional Registrar of this Court. This order shall cease to have its effect on 25.04.2025 or on the date on which the applicant surrenders himself before the Court concerned, whichever is earlier. It is made clear that in case applicant/accused failed to appear before the trial court, the surety furnished by him shall be forfeited. The application stands disposed of in above terms. JUDGE JUDGE *Faisal*
